mapper.select: SELECT * FROM wrong_question WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY last_wrong_time DESC
SELECT * FROM wrong_question WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND question_id = #{questionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wrong_question (user_id, question_id, user_answer, wrong_count, status, note) VALUES (#{userId}, #{questionId}, #{userAnswer}, #{wrongCount}, #{status}, #{note})
mapper.update: UPDATE wrong_question SET wrong_count = wrong_count + 1, last_wrong_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
